metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills

plugins.name: commit-msg
plugins.description: Suggests 3 commit message options based on git diff and project conventions

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, test, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude Code skills

plugins.name: readme
plugins.description: Write a new README.md or improve an existing one for any repository

plugins.name: branch-report
plugins.description: Generates a branch comparison report with simple explanations and senior developer review

plugins.name: seo-meta
plugins.description: Generates SEO metadata (slug, subtitle, tags, SEO title, description) as YAML frontmatter for markdown articles

plugins.name: understand-anything
plugins.description: Transforms codebases into interactive knowledge graphs with visualization, chat, diff analysis, and onboarding guides

plugins.name: planning-with-files
plugins.description: Implements Manus-style file-based planning to organize and track progress on complex tasks

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Design skill that guides AI tools toward creating better frontend UI designs by avoiding common pitfalls

plugins.name: openspec
plugins.description: Spec-driven development framework that aligns AI and humans on requirements before writing code
